headline: Do PulteGroup’s (PHM) Margin Pressures Undercut Its Active Adult Community Expansion Story?
summary: Earlier this year, PulteGroup’s Del Webb brand marked the groundbreaking of a future resort-style clubhouse at Del Webb Desert Retreat in Indio, California, with local leaders attending and completion targeted for summer 2027. At the same time, PulteGroup’s latest quarter showed revenues roughly in line with expectations but softer earnings per share and declining returns on invested capital, underscoring pressures on profitability despite continued investment in higher-margin active adult...
